genre_preference.value: mixed (likes adventure, fantasy; dislikes poorly executed comedies)
evidence: I like fantasy films and would give Legend a higher rating except that a lot of the footage originally produced was cut from the final film.
The movie is supposed to be funny, but just doesn't cut it.
Despite the predictable plot (and outcome), the movies raises some interesting points.

The movie is about a boy who finds himself used by a rich girl and a stablehand in their desire to have a romantic affair, and how it winds up traumatizing him.
Meticulous attention to detail and proper use of black and white photography gives this story of the self-destructive life of pro-boxer Jake LaMotta extra-added emphasis.
The special effects in the movie are good, the acting very good.

summary: The user enjoys a mix of adventure and fantasy films but is critical of poorly executed comedies. They appreciate quality production and detail but prefer straightforward narratives and pacing, indicating a balanced taste in movies.
